query: What are the core ramping and output level sustainance requirements for non-spinning reserves in ERCOT?
final_answer:
In ERCOT, **Non-Spinning Reserve (Non-Spin / NSRS)** is essentially a **30-minute response / four-hour sustained-output reserve product**.

Core requirements:

1. **30-minute ramp/start/interruption requirement**
   - **Generation Resources**, whether online or offline, must be capable of being **synchronized and ramped to a specified output level within 30 minutes**.  
   - **Load Resources** must be capable of being **interrupted or reducing consumption within 30 minutes**.  
   - ERCOT’s current Nodal Protocols define Non-Spin as using offline generation that can be synchronized and ramped within 30 minutes, or load that can be interrupted within 30 minutes; online unloaded capacity can also provide it if it meets the 30-minute response requirement.  
   **Source:** ERCOT Current Nodal Protocols, Section 2 definition of “Non-Spinning Reserve (Non-Spin)” and Section 3.17.3 “Non-Spinning Reserve Service,” available from ERCOT Current Protocols page: https://www.ercot.com/mktrules/nprotocols/current

2. **Four-hour sustained output / interruption requirement**
   - Generation providing Non-Spin must be able to **run at the specified output level for at least four consecutive hours**.  
   - Controllable Load Resources must be able to **consume at the ERCOT-instructed level for at least four consecutive hours** after being dispatched.  
   - ERCOT’s Protocol definition states that Non-Spin capacity must be able to operate, or load must be able to be interrupted, at the specified level for **at least four consecutive hours**; online unloaded capacity must also be sustainable at the specified level for **at least four consecutive hours**.  
   **Source:** ERCOT Current Nodal Protocols, Section 2 definition of “Non-Spinning Reserve (Non-Spin)” and Section 3.17.3, via https://www.ercot.com/mktrules/nprotocols/current

3. **Online generation qualification/capability is bounded by ramp capability**
   - In ERCOT’s real-time Ancillary Service Capacity Monitor, online generation Non-Spin capability is calculated as the lower of the Non-Spin award, remaining up capability, **30 × Non-Spin Ramp Rate**, and Non-Spin qualification. For Energy Storage Resources, ERCOT also applies the requirement that the capability be sustainable for the Non-Spin duration requirement.  
   **Source:** ERCOT System Ancillary Service Capacity Monitor description: https://www.ercot.com/content/cdr/html/as_capacity_monitor.html

4. **NPRR1096 codified the four-hour duration requirement**
   - ERCOT’s NPRR1096, approved May 12, 2022, required resources providing Non-Spin to limit their responsibility to capacity that can be **sustained for four consecutive hours**.  
   **Source:** ERCOT NPRR1096 issue page: https://www.ercot.com/mktrules/issues/NPRR1096

**Bottom line:** ERCOT Non-Spin must be deliverable within **30 minutes** and, for the core awarded capability, sustainable at the instructed/output level for **at least four consecutive hours**.

tool_input.code:
import requests, re
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
url='https://www.ercot.com/mktrules/nprotocols/current'
html=requests.get(url,timeout=20).text
print(html[:1000])
soup=BeautifulSoup(html,'html.parser')
for a in soup.find_all('a'):
    txt=a.get_text(' ',strip=True)
    href=a.get('href')
    if 'Section 2' in txt or 'Section 3' in txt or 'Section 8' in txt:
        print(txt, href)

import requests, zipfile, io, re
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
url='https://www.ercot.com/files/docs/2024/06/28/02-060126_Nodal.docx'
data=requests.get(url,timeout=30).content
z=zipfile.ZipFile(io.BytesIO(data))
xml=z.read('word/document.xml')
soup=BeautifulSoup(xml,'xml')
text='\n'.join([p.get_text(' ',strip=True) for p in soup.find_all('p')])
for term in ['Non-Spinning Reserve Service','Non-Spin','Non-Spinning']:
    print('TERM',term)
    for m in re.finditer(term, text, re.I):
        print(text[m.start()-500:m.start()+1200])
        break

import requests, zipfile, io, re
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
url='https://www.ercot.com/files/docs/2025/09/01/03-060126_Nodal.docx'
data=requests.get(url,timeout=30).content
z=zipfile.ZipFile(io.BytesIO(data))
xml=z.read('word/document.xml')
soup=BeautifulSoup(xml,'xml')
paras=[p.get_text(' ',strip=True) for p in soup.find_all('p')]
text='\n'.join(paras)
for term in ['3.17.3','Non-Spin','Non-Spinning Reserve']:
    print('TERM',term)
    for m in re.finditer(re.escape(term), text, re.I):
        print(text[m.start()-1000:m.start()+2000])
        print('---')
        break
# print occurrences around 3.17.3 and 3.17.4 headings
for i,p in enumerate(paras):
    if '3.17.3' in p or 'Non-Spinning Reserve' in p:
        print('PARA',i,p)
        print('\n'.join(paras[i:i+20]))
        print('====')
        break

url='https://www.ercot.com/files/docs/2025/09/01/03-060126_Nodal.docx'
data=requests.get(url,timeout=30).content
z=zipfile.ZipFile(io.BytesIO(data)); soup=BeautifulSoup(z.read('word/document.xml'),'xml')
paras=[p.get_text(' ',strip=True) for p in soup.find_all('p')]
for i,p in enumerate(paras):
    if p.strip()=='3.17.3 Non-Spinning Reserve Service' or p.startswith('3.17.3 Non-Spinning Reserve Service'):
        print(i, repr(p[:100]))
# print around later occurrence near end
indices=[i for i,p in enumerate(paras) if '3.17.3 Non-Spinning Reserve Service' in p]
print(indices[:10], len(indices))
for i in indices[-3:]:
    print('--- index', i)
    print('\n'.join(paras[i:i+25]))

Core requirements:

1. **30-minute ramp/start/interruption requirement**

   - **Load Resources** must be capable of being **interrupted or reducing consumption within 30 minutes**.  
   - ERCOT’s current Nodal Protocols define Non-Spin as using offline generation that can be synchronized and ramped within 30 minutes, or load that can be interrupted within 30 minutes; online unloaded capacity can also provide it if it meets the 30-minute response requirement.  
   **Source:** ERCOT Current Nodal Protocols, Section 2 definition of “Non-Spinning Reserve (Non-Spin)” and Section 3.17.3 “Non-Spinning Reserve Service,” available from ERCOT Current Protocols page: https://www.ercot.com/mktrules/nprotocols/current

2. **Four-hour sustained output / interruption requirement**
   - Generation providing Non-Spin must be able to **run at the specified output level for at least four consecutive hours**.  
   - Controllable Load Resources must be able to **consume at the ERCOT-instructed level for at least four consecutive hours** after being dispatched.

For Energy Storage Resources, ERCOT also applies the requirement that the capability be sustainable for the Non-Spin duration requirement.
